headline: Car owners caught in government fight that could cost them big
summary: President Donald Trump has come out in support of the REPAIR Act, a bill making its way through Congress that would ensure a car owner's right to repair and modify their vehicles without artificial barriers imposed by car manufacturers. According to some consumer advocacy groups, original equipment ...
